title: Map Atlases - Fancy Minimap Frame
description: A new fancy minimap frame for Map Atlases!
body:
A little overhaul for the minimap hud from [Map Atlases](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-atlases-forge) to give it my own little flair. 

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa14f7795d4faaccb7004b5d2cb63ec892695b83.png)

Feel free to add to any modpacks!

Sometimes the Minimap doesn't line up exactly to the frame at certain scales. From testing, scales that are multiples of 0.5 tend to line up good. I like 1.5
